zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert ll d'Estouteville於大約1040年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯時，他的父親Robert d'Estouteville I32歲，母親Jeanne de Talbot18歲。他和Beatrix of Valmont至少有3個兒子。他去世於1107年在英國享年68歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert ll d'Estouteville于大约1040年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯时，他的父亲Robert d'Estouteville I32岁，母亲Jeanne de Talbot18岁。他和Beatrix of Valmont至少有3个儿子。他去世于1107年在英国享年68岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: ll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert ll d'Estouteville was born about 1040, in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Robert d'Estouteville I, was 32 and his mother, Jeanne de Talbot, was 18. He had at least 3 sons with Beatrix of Valmont. He died in 1107, in England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

historicEvents.description: Le nom de la localité est attesté sous les formes Walemunt (sans date) ou au XIIe siècle, Galemunt au XIIe siècle, Walemont en 1236, Walemont en 1262, Walemont en 1272, Vallemont en 1300, Valmont en 1385. Il s'agit d'une formation toponymique médiévale en -mont au sens de « colline, hauteur », appellatif précédé du nom de personne scandinave Váli (vieux danois Wale) que l'on rencontre dans plusieurs noms de lieux de Normandie

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert ll d'Estouteville est né environ 1040, à Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Robert d'Estouteville I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Talbot, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Beatrix of Valmont. Il est décédé en 1107, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert ll d'Estouteville um 1040 in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert d'Estouteville I 32 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Talbot 18. Er hatte mit Beatrix of Valmont mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1107 im Alter von 68 Jahren in England und wurde in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert ll d'Estouteville è nato il circa 1040 nel Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert d'Estouteville I, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Talbot, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Beatrix of Valmont. Morì nel 1107, nel England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert ll d'Estoutevilleが約1040年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエストウテヴィレ-eカレスで生まれた時，父Robert d'Estouteville Iは32歳，母Jeanne de Talbotは18歳であった。彼はBeatrix of Valmontとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1107年にイギリスで68歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメヴァルモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert ll d'Estouteville(이)가 대략 1040년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 에스토우테비레-e캘레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert d'Estouteville I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Talbot(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Beatrix of Valmont(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1107년 영국에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 발몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert ll d'Estouteville nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert d'Estouteville I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Talbot, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Beatrix of Valmont. Ele faleceu em 1107, em Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert ll d'Estouteville родился около 1040 г. в местности эстоутевилле-eкаллесь, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert d'Estouteville I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Talbot, 18. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Beatrix of Valmont. Он умер в 1107 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности валмонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert ll d'Estouteville nació aproximadamente 1040, en Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert d'Estouteville I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Talbot, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Beatrix of Valmont. Murió en 1107, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
